title: Provider
description: The `provider/*` methods (Phase 7): declarative LLM providers an extension contributes, proxied through the host. `provider/complete` (host → ext, request) runs one completion — when `stream` is set the extension emits `provider/delta` (ext → host, notification) chunks keyed by `request_id` while it works, then replies with the final result. `provider/oauth_login` / `provider/oauth_refresh` (host → ext, request) run the auth handshake; the extension drives any user interaction back over the `ui/*` surface and returns the resulting credentials. `messages`/`tools` are opaque JSON — the host's serialized message/tool-schema shape (the host is the single source of truth). A `provider/delta` `event` is a serialized host stream event, e.g. `{"type":"Delta","content":"…"}`.

request_id.description: Correlates the `provider/delta` stream with this request.

provider.description: The registered provider name (bare, as the extension declared it).

tools.description: Serialized tool schemas offered to the model (host `ToolSchema` shape).

stream.description: Ask the extension to stream `provider/delta` notifications.

response_format.description: OpenAI-compatible `response_format` for structured output, if constrained.

thinking.description: Reasoning/thinking level (e.g. `off`, `low`, `medium`, `high`, or a provider-specific token). Omit for the provider default.

context.description: Dispatch context the host attaches (informational to the extension).

arguments.description: Tool arguments as parsed JSON (any JSON value).

reasoning_content.description: Reasoning/thinking content that must be replayed on subsequent requests for thinking-mode upstreams.

resolved_model.description: Concrete upstream model the provider resolved this request to.

request_id.description: The in-flight `provider/complete` request this chunk belongs to.

event.description: A serialized host stream event. Tagged by `type`: `Delta`{content}, `Reasoning`{content}, `ToolCallStart`{index,id,name}, `ToolCallArgumentsDelta`{index,arguments_chunk}, `Usage`{…}, `Model`{name}, `Done`{finish_reason}.

provider.description: The registered provider name to authenticate.

refresh_token.description: Present on `provider/oauth_refresh`; the current refresh token to exchange.

context.description: Command-tier dispatch context the host attaches.

Credentials.title: ProviderCredentials
Credentials.description: Credentials an OAuth handshake produced. Every field optional so an api-key exchange and a full OAuth bundle both fit; opaque to the host beyond persistence.

expires_at.description: Absolute expiry, unix seconds. Omit for non-expiring/unknown.
